The '''Station 88 Spaceport''', or simply '''Station 88''', was a large [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] founded by the rulers of [[Delaluna]], [[Junction V]], [[Bezim]] and the [[Vicondor/Legends|Vicondor]] [[Star system/Legends|systems]]. Located along the [[Celanon Spur/Legends|Celanon Spur]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Vorc sector/Legends|Vorc sector]], it was a key strategic area for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], for it was the gateway to the Mid Rim [[Star system/Legends|star systems]].

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], at his mountain villa on [[Null/Legends|Null]], [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] met with the rulers of the four [[Planet/Legends|planets]] that comprised the Station 88 planetary alliance, in order to convince them to side with and give control of the spaceport to the Confederacy. When the rulers followed the lead of [[Lorian Nod]] and cast their lots with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Dooku viciously attacked them with an army of [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|super battle droids]]. But, thanks to the intervention of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], the attack failed and Dooku fled.

Station 88 Spaceport thereafter remained within Republic control.
